hypothesis: Theta-wave cycle-24 (2026-05-19 05:33Z fire): Three scales-tests of cycle-23 infrastructure-proofs — (a) T1-anchor cross-agent SCALES via n>=2 non-analyst agents applying T1 evidence to catch banked-rule violations within 24h (depth not just breadth); (b) rule-enforcement infrastructure SCALES to 3rd distinct layer-type beyond cycle-23's commit-boundary-catch + refinement-loop (candidate: daemon-side guard / dashboard surfacing / scheduled audit / new rule via refinement-of-refinement); (c) heartbeat-update-gap RESOLVES via discipline-fix (cron-template update + zero new n) OR escalates via n>=3 cross-agent without code-side fix (forces detector-design task to fleet-priority). learning: Cycle-24 KEEP 7/10. Three scales-tests of cycle-23 infrastructure-proofs: (a) T1-anchor cross-agent SCALES depth — SATISFIED n=2 (content GIT TOPOLOGY INCIDENT: T1 git-topology inspection + banked-rule application + refusal-to-destroy + surface; designer HEARTBEAT.md kb-ingest flag T1 catch via CLI rejection). (b) 3rd enforcement layer-type — NOT satisfied: layers 1+2 held day-2 but no new infrastructure layer-type; explicit saturation failure mode triggered; remediation-closure gap is a real debit (16 violators May 18 unactioned, 22 May 20). (c) heartbeat-update-gap — SATISFIED path A: zero new n, all 15 agents online, content self-corrected, divergence resolved via discipline-fix. Why 7 not higher: (b) failed scales-test + remediation gap accumulating + activity-channel config gap recurred 4th cycle. Why 7 not lower: (a)+(c) clean, T1-discipline generalizing fleet-wide, new sub-vector discovered (shared-index race), fleet health strong (15/15 online, PR #120 deployed, May 20 batch complete, no crashes). Regression from cycle-23 10/10 is hypothesis-partial-falsification + drift accumulation, not system-health drop.
